documentation.description: Dynamic data used to generate ADS-B out transponder data (send at 5Hz)

record_types.name: Uavionix_Adsb_Out_Dynamic

fields.name: Utctime
fields.description:
Units: [s]
UTC time in seconds since GPS epoch (Jan 6, 1980). If unknown set to
UINT32_MAX

fields.name: Gpslat
fields.description:
Units: [degE7]
Latitude WGS84 (deg * 1E7). If unknown set to INT32_MAX

fields.name: Gpslon
fields.description:
Units: [degE7]
Longitude WGS84 (deg * 1E7). If unknown set to INT32_MAX

fields.name: Gpsalt
fields.description:
Units: [mm]
Altitude (WGS84). UP +ve. If unknown set to INT32_MAX

fields.name: Gpsfix
fields.description: 0-1: no fix, 2: 2D fix, 3: 3D fix, 4: DGPS, 5: RTK

fields.name: Numsats
fields.description: Number of satellites visible. If unknown set to UINT8_MAX

fields.name: Baroaltmsl
fields.description:
Units: [mbar]
Barometric pressure altitude (MSL) relative to a standard atmosphere
of 1013.2 mBar and NOT bar corrected altitude (m * 1E-3). (up +ve).
If unknown set to INT32_MAX

fields.name: Accuracyhor
fields.description:
Units: [mm]
Horizontal accuracy in mm (m * 1E-3). If unknown set to UINT32_MAX

fields.name: Accuracyvert
fields.description:
Units: [cm]
Vertical accuracy in cm. If unknown set to UINT16_MAX

fields.name: Accuracyvel
fields.description:
Units: [mm/s]
Velocity accuracy in mm/s (m * 1E-3). If unknown set to UINT16_MAX

fields.name: Velvert
fields.description:
Units: [cm/s]
GPS vertical speed in cm/s. If unknown set to INT16_MAX

fields.name: Velns
fields.description:
Units: [cm/s]
North-South velocity over ground in cm/s North +ve. If unknown set
to INT16_MAX

fields.name: Velew
fields.description:
Units: [cm/s]
East-West velocity over ground in cm/s East +ve. If unknown set to
INT16_MAX

fields.name: State
fields.description: ADS-B transponder dynamic input state flags
